---
title: "muninn_refactor.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/muninn_refactor.py"
loc: 64
complexity: 1
logic_score: 4.82
style_score: 3.67
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 7.07
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating internal logic. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 50 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)

### Exports
Internal logic only.
